鬥士貓 🐾   140B
貓咪番長 🐾
  • Data was pulled from the app and event data.
  • Data was completely based on bc-tw.yaml.
  • Clicking on the cat's name simulates rolling to that cat.
  • Clicking on 🐾 leads to the cat data.
  • Guaranteed cat will only show if the event has guaranteed cats.
  • Track A or B is purely perspective. Rolling a guaranteed cat will swap the track, not jump. You're always on track A, and the other track is the alternative track.
  • Step-up counts as 15 rolls by summing 3, 5, and 7.
    • Super cats
    • Super in Uberfest or Epicfest only
    • Uber cats
    • Uber in Uberfest or Epicfest only
    • Exclusive cats
    • Found cats
    • Legendary cats if available
    • Priority: Legendary > Found > Exclusive > others
    • Owned cats (original color on the left)
    • Rolled cats
    • Rolled cats with consecutive (11 or 15) rolls
    • Next position after the rolls
  • Prediction of next festival exclusive cats would show if the picked event contains them.
  • Server time is UTC. Event time isn't taken into account yet.
Help / Source © 2018-2026 Lin Jen-Shin (godfat)
